nodes.text: MC enters town. What does the MC choose to do?

choices.text: Visit the market. Perhaps find missing gear or clues.
Head to the tavern. The bar is always full of gossip.

nodes.text: Visit the market. Perhaps find missing gear or clues.

choices.text: Speak to vendors about what they've seen or what they can offer.
Steal supplies from a vendor. Risk: Get caught. Reward: Get supplies

nodes.text: Speak to vendors about what they've seen or what they can offer.

choices.text: Speak to Clara. The dueling champion of the town currently teaching villages how to fight.
Speak to Luke. The owner of Luke's Blue Farm. Currently offering free samples of his local bread.

nodes.text: Speak to Clara. The dueling champion of the town currently teaching villages how to fight.

choices.text: Hello new friend, I'm providing weapons and teaching fighting techniques to those who might of encountered the beast. Come join me and I'll show you the proper way to fight

nodes.text: Speak to Luke. The owner of Luke's Blue Farm. Currently offering free samples of his local bread.

choices.text: You're not from around here are you? Wait a minute, do you own that ship that crashed nearby? That was dangerously close to my farm, friend. Here take some supplies and make your way over. Stay safe

nodes.text: Steal supplies from a vendor. Risk: Get caught. Reward: Get supplies

choices.text: You get caught!

nodes.text: Steal supplies from a vendor. Risk: Get caught. Reward: Get supplies

choices.text: You get succeed!

nodes.text: Head to the tavern. The bar is always full of gossip from villagers.

choices.text: Start a bar brawl to search for items to use in your next fight.
Buy a drink for the mysterious hidden figure. This could provide valuable insight or be a dangerous trap.

nodes.text: Start a bar brawl to search for items to use in your next fight.

choices.text: Sneakily grab a glass bottle from the bar and throw it across the room.
Shove the man next to you. Then point to the man to the other side of you.

nodes.text: Sneakily grab a glass bottle from the bar and throw it across the room.

choices.text: The bartender Frank catches you and kicks you out!

A bar fight begins. While everyone is distracted you find the following: Your satchel near a strange mysterious person, but it only contains one small carving knife, and a letter in the backroom discussing a strange encounter the other day when something fell from the sky nearby.

nodes.text: Shove the man next to you. Then point to the man to the other side of you.

choices.text: A bar fight begins. While everyone is distracted you find the following: Your satchel near a strange mysterious person, but it only contains one small carving knife, and a letter in the backroom discussing a strange encounter the other day when something fell from the sky nearby.

nodes.text: Buy a drink for the mysterious hidden figure. This could provide valuable insight or be a dangerous trap.

choices.text: Offer Luna another drink
Distract Luna with more questions

nodes.text: Distract her with a drink: Luna starts fumbling her words, dropping the satchel to the ground. You quickly reach for it hiding it next to you. Points +2

choices.text: You steal back your satchel and slip out of the tavern quietly

nodes.text: You attempt to distract her with more questions, but Luna sees beneath your deception. 'That's all the information I have.' Luna gets up quickly, satchel in hand, and leaves.

choices.text: You let her go. At least you got some information.

nodes.text: You leave the town.

As you head out toward the ravine in search of the legendary armorer, a grizzled hunter calls out to you. 'You don’t want to face the Beast alone. I’m Brant. Been chasing her for years. I saw you in the tavern — you’ve got guts. What do you say? Team up?'

choices.text: Stick to the original plan — go find the armorer and the silent boots.
Join forces with Brant and fight the Beast together.

nodes.text: You thank Brant but decide to press on toward the ravine. It's getting dark — if you don’t hurry, the Beast might take your ship for good.

choices.text: You always were a bit of a lone wolf, as you make your way to the armorer, if they even exist, you come across a wide ravine

Brant tries to urge you to reconsider, he's seen this beast many times, he rolls back his sleeve to show a large scar that has long since healed, remnants of a terrifying encounter 'You'll need me, trust me'

nodes.text: You rely on Brant's tracking skills to lead you through the treacherous jungle to the beast, you and Brant both begin to feel nervous, but you can both tell its something beyond just the beast ahead of you, and you aren't sure why

choices.text: You and Brant come up with a plant to lay a trap for the beast
You tell Brant to distract the beast while you go for the heart with your knife 'You ready?' Brant asks you with a smug look on his face. This must be fun for him

nodes.text: 'as you both creep closer, you both make your best attempts at silence while you get closer to set up the trap, you hear a branch snap and look down in horror to see it came from just beneath your foot.

choices.text: IT HEARD YOU! [PANIC NOISES]

nodes.text: 'You ready?' Brant asks you with a smug look on his face. This must be fun for him

choices.text: OH YEAH!
are you kidding?

nodes.text: You reach the ravine. It’s deep and steep — vines hang down the edge.

choices.text: Try and use the vines for ... something?
Try to walk around it.

nodes.text: You decide these vines are better off used in some way to advance your journey!

choices.text: Attempt to create a rudimentary rope bridge accross the increasingly intimidating gap
This gap is much too huge, you decide ot use th evines to rappel down to the bottom to try and climb down and back up

nodes.text:
You rappel down safely 
+1 point!

choices.text: Continue...

nodes.text:
Your vines snapped seconds into your journey of building the bridge, fall to the bottom of the ravine 
-2 points!

choices.text: Continue...

nodes.text: Wait... do you hear a distant clanging of metal? You decide to investigate and come across a large cave and a bright forge catching your eye 'You're not the first to seek these,' he says, handing over black spider-silk boots. 'But you must climb out alone.' How did he know my mission?

choices.text: Take the boots and climb out.

nodes.text: You emerge, boots snug and soundless. You're ready to face the Beast — quietly.

choices.text: Approach the Beast with stealth.

nodes.text: Walking around the ravine is slow. You almost give up — but then, in the distance, you see a glint — your ship?

choices.text: That could be dangerous to go immediately, maybe I should backtrack for more supplies, it is getting kind of dark though...
YOUR SHIP?? Oh Bertha, gotta go after it now! danger is your middle name

nodes.text: You rush the clearing — it IS YOUR SHIP, but the Beast is turning. You made too much noise!

choices.text: Sprint faster!

nodes.text: encounter Boss
